com.billing.charge.calculation.impl.cache.CaffeineReferenceDataCache -- 기준정보 사전 적재 완료: tenantId=TENANT_buZyFxAyGZ, keys=1 timestamp = 2026-02-27T18:12:08.087923, ReferenceDataCacheRoundTripPropertyTest:preloadedDataShouldBeRetrievableByKey = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 128 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 16 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 8750780005320267758 | random seed to reproduce generated values
timestamp = 2026-02-27T18:12:08.126612, ReferenceDataCacheRoundTripPropertyTest:cachedDataShouldMatchOriginalOnSubsequentQuery = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 128 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 20 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 2629772668074732477 | random seed to reproduce generated values
testsuite.system-err: 2월 27, 2026 6:12:08 오후 net.jqwik.engine.properties.RandomizedShrinkablesGenerator logEdgeCasesOutnumberTriesIfApplicable 정보: Edge case generation exceeds number of tries. Stopped after 128 generated cases. 2월 27, 2026 6:12:08 오후 net.jqwik.engine.properties.RandomizedShrinkablesGenerator logEdgeCasesOutnumberTriesIfApplicable 정보: Edge case generation exceeds number of tries. Stopped after 128 generated cases.
